meaning: n.乌托邦的理想,空想的社会改革案
examples: Utopianism: This shit does not stink.
This utopianism is almost nowhere to be found today.
This can all sound a little like, well, '60s-style utopianism.
He learned from the early Zionist leader Yehuda Pinsker's seminal pamphlet, Auto-Emancipation, that Zionism rejects utopianism.
As long as it remains so, utopianism is still a valid response.
